titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ziyad Ibn Suwqah
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ziyad Ibn Suwqah

segments: ه عن زياد بن سوقة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن زياد بن سوقة.
arabic.text: ه عن زياد بن سوقة فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أيّوب بن نوح، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن زياد بن سوقة.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ziyad ibn Suwqah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Ziyad ibn Suwqah.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ziyad ibn Suwqah has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ayyub ibn Nuh, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Ziyad ibn Suwqah.
